'''Gretta Spinbalio''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] who worked as a representative of [[High Inquisitor]] [[Halmere]]'s office. She was the official spokesbeing during the case of the discovery of [[Canna Omonda]]'s affiliations with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|4|Galaxywide NewsNets}} {{1st}}
